flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mercer University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mercer University rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 (50.9% → 63.2%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Mercer University are 24% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($58.4k vs $47.1k).
